description: Distinct students in the current filtered cohort.
logic_source: App aggregation over standardized student-level rows
limitations: Depends on the identity resolution already present in the loaded bundle.

description: Count of filtered students whose latest roster status is active.
logic_source: Existing status buckets from enhanced outputs or processed status normalization
notes: For processed-only bundles, active status is inferred from the latest membership code.
limitations: Historical activeness is not the same as current chapter standing.

description: Share of eligible students ever observed to graduate after organization entry.
logic_source: Existing enhanced / snapshot-augmented observed graduation flags
numerator_label: Students with observed eventual graduation flag
denominator_label: Students with an observed organization-entry cohort
notes: This preserves the repo's observed-outcome framing rather than inventing an institutional first-time graduation rate.
limitations: Observed graduation depends on available follow-up coverage.

description: Observed share graduating within four years of organization entry.
notes: Recent cohorts may be excluded from the denominator.

description: Observed share graduating within six years of organization entry.
logic_source: Existing enhanced builder right-censored 6-year flag or processed 6-year proxy
notes: This is one of the best ranking metrics for long-run outcomes.
limitations: Processed-only bundles use the lighter-weight legacy summary.

display_name: Organization Retention To Next Observed Term
description: Share retained on chapter rosters in the next observed roster term.
numerator_label: Students retained to next observed term
denominator_label: Students with a measurable next observed term
notes: Graduates and terminal statuses before follow-up are handled upstream in the existing logic.
limitations: Not available in the simple processed bundle.

description: Share retained to the next fall after organization entry.
limitations: Not available in the simple processed bundle.

description: Share retained one academic year after organization entry.
logic_source: Enhanced one-year same-season flag or processed year-2 proxy
notes: Processed bundles use the existing year-to-year proxy from the base pipeline.
limitations: Definitions vary slightly by source bundle, so the app labels the source in the metric notes.

description: Share of students with any academic record in the next fall after organization entry.
numerator_label: Students continuing academically to next fall
denominator_label: Students with measurable next-fall academic follow-up
notes: This is academic continuation, not chapter retention.

description: Average term-based GPA metric available in the selected bundle.
logic_source: Enhanced first-year average term GPA or processed average observed term GPA
denominator_label: Students with non-missing term GPA measure
notes: The app preserves the best available term-GPA field for the selected source.
limitations: Processed and enhanced bundles do not expose identical term-GPA windows.

description: Average selected cumulative GPA across the filtered students.
logic_source: Existing enhanced overall/TxState GPA preference or processed latest cumulative GPA
notes: When both overall and institutional cumulative GPAs exist, the app prefers the most complete legacy field.
limitations: Campus baseline comparisons only exist if non-FSL students are present in the source data.

description: Average change from the first to second observed academic term after entry.
notes: Useful for improvement and decline rankings.
limitations: Not available in simple processed bundles.

description: Average latest cumulative-hours measure available in the selected bundle.
logic_source: Current snapshot total hours, enhanced longitudinal cumulative hours, or processed total earned hours proxy
notes: The app labels estimated/proxy values separately in the UI.
limitations: Processed bundles may reflect observed earned hours instead of a registrar cumulative-hours field.

description: Average observed cumulative hours at organization entry.
notes: This is observed, not estimated, when the enhanced longitudinal bundle provides it.
limitations: Unavailable in the simple processed bundle.

description: Average estimated credit hours accumulated before observed organization entry.
notes: This metric is explicitly estimated and should not be treated as exact historical fact.

description: Share of observed students with first-term GPA below 2.0.
denominator_label: Students with observed first-term GPA flag
notes: Because the denominator is based on observed rows, missing GPA history does not silently count as success.

description: Share of observed students flagged for probation or warning in the first academic year after entry.
denominator_label: Students with observed first-year standing history
notes: Useful for fair subgroup comparisons when combined with controls.

description: Share of filtered students matched to a current one-row-per-student snapshot.
denominator_label: Students with snapshot match field present
notes: Useful for understanding how much of the current augmented bundle is actually resolved by snapshot data.

description: Average share of core fields populated on filtered student rows.
logic_source: App-level completeness score using configured core fields
notes: This is an app-level QA metric and does not replace the repo's formal QA tables.
limitations: The core field list is configurable in config/app_settings.json.
